Risk Description: Unauthorised remote access due to absence of enforced MFA and endpoint compliance
Vulnerabilities: MFA not enforced, no device compliance
Proposed Controls (Annex A 2022 + NGU po: A.8.5 / A.5.17 / A.6.7 — enforce MFA (Access Control Policy NGU-POL-9.1); endpoint compliance & VPN (Remote Working Policy NGU-POL-6.2); route logs to SIEM

Risk Description: Critical assets unclassified or without active owner accountability
Vulnerabilities: Inconsistent classification, no asset-level risk assessments
Proposed Controls (Annex A 2022 + NGU po: A.5.9 / A.5.10 / A.5.12 — IAO accountability & asset register (Asset Owners Handbook NGU-POL-8.1); classification (Information Classification Policy NGU-POL-8.2)

Risk Description: Breach of student/staff personal data (UK GDPR)
Proposed Controls (Annex A 2022 + NGU po: A.5.34 / A.8.3 / A.8.24 — access restriction & encryption (Access Control NGU-POL-9.1, Cryptographic Policy NGU-POL-10.1); PII handling (Classification NGU-POL-8.2)

Risk Description: Control failure or breach goes undetected due to no monitoring or log review
Proposed Controls (Annex A 2022 + NGU po: A.8.15 / A.8.16 / A.5.25 — centralised logging & monitoring, KRIs/KCIs (Incident Management Policy NGU-POL-16.1)

Risk Description: Risks left unmanaged because the risk register is not operationalised
Vulnerabilities: No risk-register owner, no review cycle
Proposed Controls (Annex A 2022 + NGU po: Clause 6.1 / Clause 8 — risk-register ownership & quarterly review (Risk Management Policy NGU-POL-IRM01, Methodology NGU-POL-4.1)

Risk Description: Data exposure through cloud/third-party services without security assurance
Vulnerabilities: No cloud security baseline, weak supplier assurance
Proposed Controls (Annex A 2022 + NGU po: A.5.19 / A.5.23 — supplier due diligence (Supplier Security Policy NGU-POL-15.1); cloud security baseline (2022 transition gap)

Risk Description: Ransomware/malware compromise of endpoints and connected systems
Proposed Controls (Annex A 2022 + NGU po: A.8.7 / A.8.8 / A.8.1 — anti-malware, vulnerability & patch management, endpoint protection (Remote Working NGU-POL-6.2, Acceptable Use NGU-POL-8.1.3)

Risk Description: Personal data retained beyond need / no secure deletion (UK GDPR Art.17)
Proposed Controls (Annex A 2022 + NGU po: A.8.10 / A.5.34 / A.5.12 — secure deletion & retention (Information Classification Policy NGU-POL-8.2 update; 2022 transition gap)
